completion_scope: approved seeded-custom-volume source/test/verification completed; authorized seed helper exited nonzero on chown under cap_drop ALL; Postgres was not recreated under this amendment; T054 gates not started

approval.statement_supplied: approve the seeded custom-config volume amendment.

bounded_errors: cp: can't preserve ownership of '/dest/...': Operation not permitted

failure.assessment: Compose source reached the approved hash. The exact approved seed helper uses --cap-drop ALL and then chown -R 100:101, which fails closed without CHOWN/DAC_OVERRIDE/FOWNER. Directory names were copied into foundation_postgres_custom as root:root; ownership was not normalized. No unapproved capability was added and Postgres was not recreated under this amendment.
failure.recovery: Preserve data volume, custom volume, network, and container state. Obtain a new exact HCP-04 amendment authorizing the same seed helper with only CHOWN, DAC_OVERRIDE, and FOWNER added (matching the already-approved Postgres capability set), then re-run seed ownership normalization, recreate Postgres, and resume health/T054 checks.

result.next_required_action: Exact new HCP-04 approval to add CHOWN/DAC_OVERRIDE/FOWNER to the seeded custom-config volume helper
